name: Americana Peanut Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 4 packages (3 ounces each) cream cheese, softened
1 package (4 oz) Frozen whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the chopped peanuts, graham cracker crumbs, and melted butter. Mix well.
2. Press the crumb mixture into the bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Refrigerate the crust for 20 minutes or until set.
4. In a large bowl with an electric mixer at medium speed, beat the softened cream cheese and peanut butter until fluffy.
5. Gradually beat in the condensed milk and mix well.
6. Add lemon juice and vanilla; blend well.
7. Fold in the whipped topping.
8. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
9. Garnish with the remaining chopped peanuts.
10. Refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours, or until well chilled.
